kings_guild.name: The King's Guild
kings_guild.description: Master artisans of the King's Guild each ply a different trade in a different quarter of the city. Work out who's who.
clues: The Cooper's levy is between Matilda and the artisan in Kingsford.
Kingsford, 8 coins, and 12 coins go with Beatrix, Edmund, and Matilda, in some order.
Fletcher goes with exactly two of Cedric, Millpond, and 10 coins.
Wulfric's levy is at least 3 coins away from the artisan in Eastcheap.
Matilda goes with either Bridgegate or 8 coins (but not both).
At least one of Rowan and the artisan with 16 coins belongs to the Hill Ward.
Either Eastcheap goes with 16 coins or Blacksmith goes with Millpond.
At most one member of the Ironmongers' Guild is in the River Ward.
Between Blacksmith and Tanner, one goes with Matilda and the other with 16 coins.
Exactly one of these is true: Potter goes with 16 coins; Potter goes with 18 coins; Tanner goes with Bridgegate.
Either 12 coins does not go with Blacksmith or Wulfric goes with Millpond (but not both) if and only if someone in the River Ward goes with Rowan.
Matilda goes with at least one of Bridgegate, Millpond, or 8 coins.
14 coins goes with neither Beatrix nor Rowan.
Exactly one member of the Gate Ward belongs to the Ironmongers' Guild.
The artisan in Bridgegate and Edmund are in different guilds.
